name: Soft Molasses Cookies (L.a. Times)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in the molasses and egg. Beat well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, ground ginger, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
4. Dissolve the baking soda in the water.
5. Add the flour mixture and dissolved baking soda to the butter mixture alternately. Blend well after each addition.
6. Drop batter by rounded tablespoon onto lightly greased and floured (or foil-lined) baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until done.
8. Remove from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
9. Makes about 2 to 3 dozen cookies.
10. Each of the 3 dozen cookies contains approximately: 81 calories; 31 mg sodium; 13 mg cholesterol; 3 grams fat; 13 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram protein; 0.03 gram fiber.
